final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational infographic explaining definitions and relationships between AI concepts (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a hand-drawn sketch aesthetic — exact line weight and texture is yours
Composition: must include a clear visual hierarchy showing concept definitions and their relationships
Subject: must include all 7 concepts with their definitions and interconnections:
  - AI
  - MCP
  - AI Agent
  - OpenClaw
  - AI Skill
  - 蒸馏
  - CLI
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an approachable, easy-to-understand educational atmosphere — exact warmth is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs hand-drawn illustration treatment — exact paper texture is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all concept names: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve all 7 concept names as listed; must show both definitions and relationships between concepts
Avoid:
